_README: Combo-assembly profiles for deck_sim.py --combos. Each deck key matches a COMMANDERS key in deck_sim.py. 'pieces' are the non-commander cards that must come together in hand (the commander is always available from the command zone and is NOT listed). 'tutors' are broad cards modelled as wildcards that can each substitute for one missing piece — an OPTIMISTIC approximation (real tutors have colour/type limits and cost mana). Numbers are card-availability floors that ignore mana; read them next to the consistency mana curve. Every piece verified present in the current .txt and against Scryfall oracle text on 2026-06-01.

combos.name: Sword of F&F + Aggravated Assault (infinite combats; Satya free)

lightning-war._note: UPDATED 2026-06-08 for the burn pivot — the old Aggravated Assault + Ozai combo was CUT (see proposals/Lightning_War_Speed_Curve_Analysis.md). The kill is now Azula (always free in the command zone) + one X-finisher, so only ONE library piece is required. Modelled as pieces=[Crackle with Power] with the other three finishers AND the three real tutors listed as wildcards: the 'drawn' row counts Crackle alone and UNDERSTATES; read the '+tutors' row, which = P(>=1 of the 4 burn finishers OR a tutor in hand). Mystical Teachings fetches instants only (slightly optimistic as a wildcard for the sorcery finishers). Twinning Staff / Galvanic Iteration / Increasing Vengeance / Reiterate amplify but aren't required, so they're not modelled here.

combos.name: Azula + an X-finisher (Crackle / Comet / Electrodominance / Banefire); commander free

calamity-tax._note: Committed V1 list (calamity-tax-20260405-061741.txt). The PRIMARY kill (Torment of Hailfire, and Exsanguinate once the 2026-05-31 swap is applied) is a single card + big mana — NOT a piece combo — so it is NOT modeled here; measure it as finisher availability + the mana curve (see proposals/Calamity_Tax_Speed_Curve_Analysis.md). What IS an assemblable 2-piece kill is the copy/reanimator line: a copy spell (kicked Rite of Replication / Doppelgang) on a death-drain creature (Kokusho or Gray Merchant). Glarb mills the creature, so creature tutors (GSZ/Chord/Finale) and Demonic act as wildcards. Card-availability floor; ignores the ~9-10 mana the kicked copy costs.

combos.name: Rite of Replication (kicked) + Kokusho/Gray Merchant (copy-death table drain)

lorehold-spirit._note: Gamble can fetch any single piece (with a random-discard risk the model ignores). 3-card loop plus a 2-or-less creature already in yard, which is plentiful and not modelled as a gating piece.

combos.name: Reveillark + Karmic Guide + Goblin Bombardment (arbitrary damage)

diminishing-returns._note: Razaketh tutors any card but must be in play with creature fodder + life — the wildcard model is optimistic. Gravecrawler loop also needs a spare Zombie + a drain payoff, both plentiful and not modelled as gating pieces.

combos.name: Gravecrawler + Phyrexian Altar (core of the aristocrats loop)
